module.description: Example script module for browser automation and local file export.
module.author: Acme Automation Team

variables.name: keyword
variables.abstract: Search keyword entered by the user.

variables.name: max_results
variables.abstract: Maximum number of rows to export.

variables.name: headless
variables.abstract: Whether the browser should run in headless mode.

variables.name: output_dir
variables.abstract: Directory used to store exported files.

variables.name: filters
variables.abstract: Optional JSON filter object passed to the script.

file_permissions.abstract: Read, write, and delete exported files in the output directory.
Read template files shipped with the project.

api_permissions.abstract: Read and submit data to the internal dashboard API.
Read public metadata from Google APIs.
